heading: About VolleyVanguard
body:
VolleyVanguard was founded by a group of friends who shared a lifelong love of volleyball and a belief that coaching, done well, changes lives off the court too. What began as informal weekend sessions has grown into a coaching collective serving players of every age and skill level.

Our philosophy is simple: train hard, look out for each other, and have fun doing it. We coach the fundamentals with care, push players to compete, and never lose sight of the joy that brought us all to the game in the first place.

Whether you're picking up a ball for the first time or working toward competitive play, we'd love to meet you on the court.
